parsedContent: The power of a God cannot be overcome! Xanzah, this is probably one of the worlds. Even gods are merely being restricted to the limited power determined by promise that's our... Although great, it's not unlimited! The voice? Alvis!? How dare you disobey me? Ah, i'm Monarda and i'll be here for a while but i won't be able to proclaim the end But that's impossible! Shulk, it is time for you two to choose Does this world belongs to Xanza, or does it belong too you? That is something I decided long ago! Eh!? Hey we used all power to fell our god, and that these are destiny! Eeehhh? It's fated, the memory of a gods existence born from the chaos of creation It is
